message:
feat(conformance): add 6 E2E scenarios for PE/staging with forensic logging (bd-3dl.14.7)

Six required E2E scenarios: jit_constant_folding, jit_mixed_known_unknown,
staging_residual_graph, staging_roundtrip (200 inputs), nested_jit (double-stage
collapse), and large_graph_staging (1000 ops, <500ms budget). All produce
forensic JSON logs with intermediate states, input/output capture, and replay
commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "frankenjax.e2e.log.v1",
+  "scenario_id": "e2e_p2c003_jit_constant_folding",
+  "test_id": "e2e_p2c003::e2e_p2c003_jit_constant_folding",
+  "packet_id": "P2C-003",
+  "fixture_id": "a41d90a8855fa272998175a329a0d08b01e544585812b537fa2ef56502e22b28",
+  "seed": null,
+  "mode": "strict",
+  "ts_utc_unix_ms": 1771116472393,
+  "env": {
+    "arch": "x86_64",
+    "os": "linux",
+    "rust_toolchain": "nightly-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"
+  },
+  "artifact_refs": [],
+  "replay_command": "cargo test -p fj-conformance --test e2e_p2c003 -- e2e_p2c003_jit_constant_folding --exact --nocapture",
+  "input_capture": {
+    "description": "jit(lambda: 2+3)() -> 5, verify constant folded at trace time",
+    "expected_output": 5,
+    "known_inputs": [
+      2,
+      3
+    ]
+  },
+  "intermediate_states": [
+    {
+      "equations": 1,
+      "invars": 2,
+      "program": "Add2",
+      "step": "jaxpr_built"
+    },
+    {
+      "all_folded": true,
+      "has_residuals": true,
+      "known_equations": 1,
+      "step": "staged",
+      "unknown_equations": 0
+    },
+    {
+      "correct": true,
+      "expected": 5,
+      "output": 5,
+      "step": "executed"
+    },
+    {
+      "step": "full_eval_matches"
+    }
+  ],
+  "output_capture": {
+    "all_folded": true,
+    "matches_full_eval": true,
+    "output": 5
+  },
+  "result": "pass",
+  "duration_ms": 0,
+  "details": null
+}
\ No newline at end of file

+    "description": "jit(lambda x: x+3)(5) -> 8, verify 3 folded, x dynamic",

+    "program": "neg_mul: f(a, b) = neg(a) * b"

+  "intermediate_states": [

+  "result": "pass",

+  "details": null
+}
